data.title: Starlight Investments tops out Spectra in Salford, UK, marking key milestone towards 393 rental homes completion.
data.description: A significant achievement has been reached in Salford, UK as Starlight Investments celebrates the topping out of Spectra, a towering 34-storey residential complex. This marks a crucial milestone in the construction of 393 premium rental homes in the area. The development is part of a larger project aimed at providing high-quality housing options in Salford. The completion of Spectra signifies substantial progress in the creation of much-needed accommodation, with the project's scale and impact on the local housing market being notable.

data.title: Microsoft partners with Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team for multiyear collaboration to integrate Microsoft technologies into race team operations.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Microsoft Corp. and the Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team have revealed a long-term partnership on Jan. 22, 2026. This collaboration aims to integrate Microsoft's technologies into the core of the race team operations. This strategic alliance signifies a significant move towards enhancing performance and efficiency within the team, emphasizing the importance of leveraging cutting-edge technology in the competitive realm of Formula 1. The partnership, spanning multiple years, is set to revolutionize the way the team functions, with Microsoft's innovative solutions playing a pivotal role in driving success on the racetrack.

data.title: Resolve M Therapeutics, specializing in pro-resolution therapy, has emerged from stealth in Cambridge, Mass., on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: A novel platform has been created with the aim of triggering pro-resolution responses to rebalance immune functioning in inflammatory conditions, without causing general immune suppression. Located in Cambridge, Massachusetts, Resolve M Therapeutics, Inc. announced this development on January 22, 2026. The company is working towards establishing the first all-encompassing solution in the field of biotechnology.

data.title: Thunes and UnionPay International partner for instant money transfers to China's mainland, ensuring faster and more transparent payments. Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: Today, Thunes, a leading global money transfer service, announced the introduction of enhanced payment services in China through an expanded partnership with UnionPay International. The upgraded payment system promises increased speed, reliability, and transparency for money transfers within China's mainland. This move aims to facilitate smoother and more efficient cross-border transactions.

data.title: JOYIN to showcase toy solutions at Spielwarenmesse 2026, aims to support global partners.
data.description: In Nuremberg, Germany on January 22, 2026, JOYIN is set to take part in Spielwarenmesse 2026. They will showcase their toy and active play business strategy with a focus on brands, catering to buyers including global retailers, distributors, and sourcing partners. The aim is to offer support through a diverse portfolio. This year's exhibition...

data.title: Clarivate introduces Nexus, linking AI users to academic resources - aiding students and researchers. NYSE: CLVT.
data.description: Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT) has announced the integration of academic content and services into AI tools utilized by students and researchers. This move aims to support libraries and institutions in maintaining their relevance in the academic sphere. The initiative, launched in London on January 22, 2026, seeks to reinforce the central role of libraries in fostering trusted scholarship. Clarivate's incorporation of this academic content into AI tools is part of its commitment to serving the global academic community.

data.title: BTL Group enforces patent rights against Lexter's WonderFace device, resolving multiple infringement proceedings.
data.description: In Prague on January 22, 2026, BTL Group, a prominent company in medical technologies, revealed that they have effectively resolved various patent infringement cases against the maker of the WonderFace device, Lexter Microelectronic Engineering Systems S.L. This announcement comes following legal proceedings and marks a significant milestone for BTL Group.

data.title: Candidate Adem Bunkeddeko proposes using part of NY's $290B pension fund to acquire stake in Madison Square Garden Sports.
data.description: Adem Bunkeddeko, a candidate running for state comptroller, has proposed utilizing a portion of New York's extensive $290 billion pension fund to acquire a stake in Madison Square Garden Sports.

data.title: BitGo's IPO set at $18 a share, NYSE trading to start soon; founders and early investors hold significant stakes.
data.description: The initial public offering (IPO) of BitGo was priced at $18 per share. The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) is anticipated to commence trading of BitGo on Thursday. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filings reveal significant ownership by the company's founders and early investors.
SOCIETE GENERALE TO TRIM FRENCH WORKFORCE

data.title: HKMA releases updated sustainable finance taxonomy phase 2A post consultation, with new transition and climate adaptation criteria, aiming to attract green capital flows.
data.description: The central bank in Hong Kong has released an updated green finance classification framework to encourage sustainable investment. This new framework includes categories for transition activities and climate adaptation in addition to the existing criteria. These additions aim to attract more environmentally-friendly capital flows into the region.
MUSK IS NOW ON THE BOOKS FOR A PANEL AT DAVOS AT 4:30 P.M. LOCAL TIME ON THURSDAY, WITH BLACKROCK CEO LARRY FINK- BUSINESS INSIDER

data.title: INVL Technology appoints ICON Corporate Finance as investment adviser on Jan 21, 2026 to sell its portfolio of companies.
data.description: INVL Technology has recently finalized the selection of an M&A investment adviser by choosing ICON Corporate Finance on 21 January 2026. The decision was made based on specific criteria and an intermediation agreement was signed with the international consultancy firm. ICON Corporate Finance will now serve as an intermediary for the sale of INVL Technology's complete portfolio of companies.

data.title: Mantle transitions to Ethereum blobs for data availability, bridging TradFi, RWAs, and on-chain liquidity.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on January 22, 2026, Mantle introduced a significant protocol shift to incorporate Ethereum blobs as its main data availability for connecting traditional finance, real-world assets, and on-chain liquidity. Mantle is a cutting-edge distribution layer enhancing the interaction between TradFi, RWAs, and on-chain liquidity.

data.title: Senator Boozman states no agreement reached with Dems on crypto bill. GOP draft of market structure bill includes safeguards for crypto developers. Mark-up scheduled for next week.
data.description: A draft of the market structure bill has been released by the US Senate Agriculture Committee, which is led by Republicans. This bill includes safeguards for crypto developers and is scheduled for markup next week.

Russia is planning new strikes on Ukraine’s energy and nuclear support facilities, Kyiv warns. Since the start of the heating season, Moscow has carried out 256 airstrikes on Ukraine’s power and critical infrastructure.
